name: golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev
title: golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev
summary: gRPC to JSON proxy generator for Golang -- sources
description:
gRPC to JSON proxy generator for Golang -- sources
Grpc-gateway is a protoc plugin that reads gRPC service definitions
and generates a reverse-proxy server which translates a RESTful JSON
API into gRPC. The server is generated according to custom options in
your gRPC definition and helps you to provide your APIs in both gRPC
and RESTful style at the same time.
.
This package contains the development files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev because gRPC to JSON proxy generator for Golang -- sources.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-grpc-ecosystem-grpc-gateway-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
